title: Create: Wrench Multitools
description: Tiered, enchantable, durability-free multitool wrenches for Create.
body:
# Create: Wrench Multitools
Tiered, enchantable, durability-free multitool wrenches for Create.
This mod fuses your tools and the wrench! Your wrench is now also your pickaxe. Your shovel. Your axe. Your everything.
## What's in the pack
Five tiers, each crafted via the smithing table:

Copper Multitool Wrench - entry tier, mines at stone-tool speed
Iron Multitool Wrench - iron-speed mining, solid all-rounder
Brass Multitool Wrench - the sweet spot. Slightly faster than iron and rolls the best enchantments in the pack (think gold-tool enchantability, without the gold-tool fragility)
Diamond Multitool Wrench - diamond-speed mining
Netherite Multitool Wrench — the endgame. Fastest mining, fireproof, immune to being set on fire in lava

Each one keeps the full Create wrench behaviour - rotate blocks, dismantle contraptions, configure devices. No functionality lost. Just added.
Features

Works on any block — mines everything at the tier's speed with full drops. No "wrong tool" slowdowns, no missing drops.
No durability, ever - these wrenches don't wear down.
Enchantable at the enchanting table - Efficiency, Fortune, Silk Touch, Curse of Vanishing. Mending and Unbreaking are deliberately excluded because they'd be meaningless on a zero-durability tool
Scaling enchantability - higher tiers roll better enchantments, with Brass punching above its weight
Smithing upgrade chain - Create Wrench → Copper → Iron → Brass → Diamond → Netherite, each step via the smithing table with a custom Wrench Upgrade Template (Netherite uses the vanilla Netherite Upgrade Template)
Full 3D model based on Create's own wrench, retextured per tier - looks right in-hand, looks right on the ground, looks right in item frames
Creative tab integration — all tools appear in the Tools & Utilities tab

## Getting started

Craft a Wrench Upgrade Template in a crafting table (8 diamonds + netherrack, with a Create Wrench in the top-middle slot — same pattern as the Netherite template)
Use a smithing table with the template, a base Create Wrench, and a copper sheet to make your first Copper Multitool Wrench
Keep upgrading up the chain as your base grows

Honest notes
This is my first mod. The textures were also my first shot at pixel art, Feedback is very welcome.

## Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1
NeoForge 21.1.219+
Create 6.0.9+

### License
MIT. Fork it, ship it, do what you like. Credit's nice but not required.
